title: Classify retryable boundary errors
scenario: Not every failure should be retried. Classification helpers let application code make decisions without string matching.
instructions: Implement is_retryable for CreateOrderUseCaseError. Only Repository(Unavailable) should return true.

hints.body: Keep the Translating errors across boundaries code active and implement is_retryable for CreateOrderUseCaseError. Only Repository(Unavailable) should return true.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Classify retryable boundary errors is shown below.

completionExplanation: Classify retryable boundary errors now extends the active Translating errors across boundaries code with boundary retryable. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
